topic: Fix smart_execution Trade.isAlive() API mismatch — TWAP/Iceberg slices were silently abandoning all chunky orders
summary: Investigated user concern that bot is sitting on 77% cash and not aggressively deploying. After several corrected false leads, root cause identified: smart_execution.py calls trade.isAlive(), a method that ib_async removed in favor of isDone(). Every TWAP/Iceberg slice was raising AttributeError and abandoning the slice with 0/N filled. Since smart execution fires on orders > $10K or > 500 shares (per CLAUDE.md threshold), this silently killed every high-conviction chunky entry. Fix: 2-line swap to isDone() with flipped boolean to preserve semantics. Committed as de15379 and restarted the bot.
motivation: User asked the bot to aggressively find positions that build alpha rather than hold 77% cash. Investigation revealed this wasn't a scoring, consensus, or sizing problem — it was a broken execution path. The bot was generating candidates and proposing trades, but the execution layer for large orders was a dead end. Fixing this is a prerequisite to evaluating whether any other gates (sizing cascade, agent consensus, short-side dampeners) are actually binding.

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: Bot is over-gated by consensus threshold and cash reserve floor
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: WRONG — cash floor inactive (77% cash >> 10% min); consensus produces ~35 qualified per scan
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: audit_log + live log showed 35 fresh-first candidates reaching agents per cycle

investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: PARTIALLY WRONG — cascade is real, but live positions include $133k AMZN, $127k GOOGL, $93k QQQ. Sizing is uneven, not uniformly tiny. 1.8% average was a misleading division (23% deployed / 13 positions)
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: ib_async portfolio updates in live log

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: 55 phantom GTC orders sit unmanaged at IBKR
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: WRONG — inferred from absence of terminal events in audit_log, but audit_log is 31% test-data polluted (SYM1/SYM2/SYM3, AAPL order_id=12345). Bot restart logged 'cancel_orphan_stop_orders: no orphan stop orders found'
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: Counter over audit_log event types; grep for test symbols

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: Bot is not running — crashed Apr 14 and never restarted
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: WRONG — ps grep looked for bot_trading.py, but launcher runs bot.py. Bot was alive and actively writing logs throughout the session
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: ps -ef | grep bot showed active python bot.py process

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: Apr 14 crash log holds a traceback explaining what killed the bot
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: WRONG — 10GB log ended benignly mid-data-collection with no Error/Exception/Traceback. Indicates external termination (OOM, Terminal closed, sleep) rather than code crash
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: tail of decifer-crash-2026-04-14T14-33-57Z.log showed normal [yf-intraday] XLV bar logs at tail

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: smart_execution.py line 306 has a Client.account AttributeError
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: CONFIRMED bug but ALREADY FIXED in commit cb3dfb2 before this session — the fix was on disk but the running bot had loaded the pre-fix module into memory
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: git log --oneline -- smart_execution.py; 684 Client.account errors in live log despite clean file on disk

investigation_arc_with_corrections.claim: smart_execution.py also calls trade.isAlive(), which ib_async removed
investigation_arc_with_corrections.status: CORRECT — live log at 22:10 showed 'TWAP execution complete: 0/518 filled at avg $0.00' with isAlive AttributeError on every slice. Confirmed isDone() is the current API
investigation_arc_with_corrections.evidence: grep in venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/ib_async/order.py showed def isDone() at line 456, no isAlive()

smart_execution.py.description: Two sites replaced. Line 336: `if trade.isAlive():` → `if not trade.isDone():` (TWAPExecutor._execute_slice loop: wait while order still working). Line 559: `if not trade.isAlive():` → `if trade.isDone():` (IcebergOrder.execute refill loop: trigger refill when current visible batch completes). Both preserve original semantics by flipping the boolean; isDone() is the inverse of the removed isAlive().
smart_execution.py.impact: TWAP/Iceberg paths no longer raise AttributeError on every slice. Large orders (>$10K or >500 shares) can now actually execute via smart-routing. Prior behavior silently abandoned every chunky order — high-conviction entries were the ones hurt most since those are what get sized large enough to trigger smart execution.

what_did_not_change: Agent consensus threshold (3/4) — candidate flow is healthy; changing this pre-fix would just multiply a broken pipe.

Position sizing cascade (kelly × conviction × regime × session × strategy × drawdown × macro × short_IC) — still 7+ multipliers, but live positions demonstrate sizing works at max conviction (e.g. AMZN $133k, GOOGL $127k). Revisit only if post-fix deployment doesn't rise.
min_cash_reserve (10%), max_single_position (6% soft / 20% hard), max_positions (100 sanity) — none binding at 77% cash.

IC validation status (7/9 dimensions disagree with backtest in live_ic_report.json) — this is a Phase 1 research finding, not a bug. Gate for Phase 2 remains 200 closed trades + IC walk-forward validation.
PM ADD trigger (commit 6e6f351) — already implements data-driven ADD when held score rises ≥15pts to ≥45. No additional rotation logic needed yet.
Universe floor, presession dry-run pipeline, opening-gap boost (all 6e6f351) — recent additions are correct; no changes here.

verification_plan.owner: Cowork, next session during market hours
checks: Grep bot_output.log for 'Client object has no attribute account' since 2026-04-15 22:18 — should be zero.
Grep bot_output.log for 'Trade object has no attribute isAlive' since 2026-04-15 22:18 — should be zero.
Grep for 'TWAP execution complete' lines — should show N/N filled with N>0, not 0/N.
Observe portfolio deployment % trend through the next trading day — expect cash to drop below 77% as previously-dying chunky orders now fill.

If deployment does NOT rise meaningfully even with smart exec working, that's evidence the sizing cascade IS binding on low-VIX days and needs revisiting. Pull 3 real filled trades, reconstruct risk math, compare actual notional to max_single_position cap.

open_items_deferred: Sizing cascade analysis — defer until post-fix market day gives us data on whether deployment actually rises. If it does, cascade was never binding. If it doesn't, revisit.

Apr 14 crash root cause — log ended cleanly with no error. Most likely external termination (OOM/sleep/Terminal close). Not reproducible from available artifacts; revisit if it happens again with fresh evidence.

IBKR STP bracket behavior — the earlier subagent flagged STP children as rejected, but memory note says VALIDATIONERROR is benign IBKR warning 2109. Orphan-stop scan at restart returned zero orphans, supporting the benign interpretation. No action needed unless it recurs with real rejection evidence.
process_notes: Multiple wrong diagnoses during this session, all corrected by direct verification rather than trusting subagent summaries. Lesson: when a subagent reports counts from a log file, spot-check the raw log before building a narrative on top. This session wasted ~3 investigation rounds on inferences from a log that turned out to be 31% test-polluted.
Bot runs from main repo (/Users/amitchopra/Desktop/decifer trading/), not from worktrees. Code edits for runtime fixes must land on master directly. This was done correctly here.
Graceful restart via SIGTERM (not SIGKILL) worked cleanly — bot exited within 8s, port 8080 freed, positions reconciled on relaunch (11 loaded from disk, 869 orders tracked, zero orphan stops).
commits: de15379 fix(smart_execution): replace removed ib_async Trade.isAlive() with isDone()
